title: PetirEnums
description: Shared enumerations for the PetirDashboard wire contract. These are the ONLY allowed values; server rejects rows with out-of-enum values per-row (INVALID_ENUM).

cursor_strategy.description: append = monotonic edge id (event tables). summary = monotonic change_seq (late-updated minute tables).

lightning_status.description: Per-minute status for lightning_minute_summary.status. 'saturated' = sensor saturation (high activity beyond reliable counting).

lightning_event_type.description: lightning_events.event_type. 'lightning' = real strike, 'disturber' = man-made interference, 'noise' = noise floor trip.
